data.title: Azure Cloud Integration
data.description: Integration with Azure's cloud services provides a robust and scalable architecture.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure Resource Manager and cloud APIs.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Implementation of decentralized microservices to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Based on Docker and Kubernetes frameworks.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Use of CDN to improve load times globally.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates Azure CDN for static assets.

data.title: RESTful API Design
data.description: Structured API endpoints for seamless data interaction.
data.technical_spec: Uses HTTP protocols with JSON data interchange format.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Efficient database partitioning to handle large volumes of transactions.
